claim.content: For a three-dimensional quasiparticle band in a metal, the quasiparticle effective mass m* and the quasiparticle density of states N(ε) at energy ε are related by the scaling m*(ε) ∝ [N(ε)]^{2/3}; accordingly, at the Fermi energy ε_F the renormalized quasiparticle effective mass is taken to satisfy m*(ε_F) ∝ [N(ε_F)]^{2/3}, and this three-dimensional relation is applied to the dominant quasiparticle bands of YbRh2Si2 in the field and temperature regime considered.
